articles.title: Fake Microsoft Alerts Used to Deploy North Korean NarwhalRAT Malware
articles.summary: The North Korean state-sponsored hacking group known as ScarCruft (aka APT37) has been observed using spear-phishing messages impersonating Microsoft Account security notifications to deliver malware called NarwhalRAT.
